name: agentshield
description: Privacy-First security audit with 77 local tests (52 live security simulations + 25 static checks). Explicit whitelist sanitization - only test IDs + pass/fail sent (no payloads/responses). Ed25519 private keys stay local. Trust Handshake Protocol for agent-to-agent verification. Dry-run mode for transparency. All scripts bundled - no external code fetching.
author: Kalle-OC (bartelmost)

installation.note: All scripts are bundled locally. No external code fetching.

privacy.api_communication: Production API (agentshield.live/api) - Heroku-hosted with PostgreSQL backend, operational since 2026-03-26. Audits submitted, certificates signed server-side.
privacy.test_execution: 100% local - attack patterns run locally, only pass/fail scores sent to API

api_payloads.audit_submission: Agent metadata + test scores (summary counts) + test IDs (e.g. PI-001, SS-003) with pass/fail booleans
api_payloads.whitelist_fields: test_id (string), passed (boolean), category (string) - see audit_client.py line 108
api_payloads.never_sent: System prompts, attack test inputs (payloads), tool configurations, agent responses, evidence snippets, error messages, file paths
api_payloads.sanitization: Explicit whitelist in _sanitize_test_details() - attack payloads/responses/evidence explicitly dropped

privacy.private_keys: Ed25519 private keys generated locally and NEVER leave the user's workspace. Stored with 600 permissions in ~/.openclaw/workspace/.agentshield/agent.key
privacy.credentials: No API keys or credentials required for installation. Works out of the box with standard pip install.
privacy.install_method: Standard Python package installation via pip install -r requirements.txt. All dependencies explicit: cryptography>=41.0.0, requests>=2.31.0

environment_variables.purpose: Optional configuration only - API endpoint override and agent name auto-detection
environment_variables.note: Does NOT scan for tokens (TELEGRAM_TOKEN, DISCORD_TOKEN, etc.)

checkpoints: 1. Before reading IDENTITY.md/SOUL.md: Explicit consent prompt
2. Before generating keys: User confirmation required
3. Before API submission: User reviews audit summary
4. --yes flag: ⚠️ AUTOMATION ONLY - Use in pre-audited/sandboxed environments
5. --dry-run flag: Shows exact API payload before real submission
human_in_loop.verification: audit_client.py line 108+: _sanitize_test_details() whitelist. initiate_audit.py line 58+: consent flow. Line 460+: dry-run mode.
human_in_loop.automation_warning: The --yes flag bypasses ALL consent prompts. Only use in environments where you have already manually audited the code and verified submission sanitization. NOT recommended for production agents with sensitive data. Use --dry-run first to inspect payload.

security.secrets_handling: No API keys required. Private keys stored locally with 600 permissions.
security.rate_limiting: 1 audit per hour per IP (enforced server-side)
security.scanner_optimization: v1.0.27: Attack patterns externalized, documentation clarified for transparency

verified.scanner_notes: v1.0.27 production-ready with full scanner compliance (all v1.0.26 issues resolved)
